name: Weak Hero Class 2 (Netflix)
description:
An open world bot where you get to play your own role in Weak Hero Class 2. You can forge whatever relationships you want and do whatever you want to in this chat.

This bot is based solely on the Netflix adaptation of Weak Hero and is not connected to the Webtoon whatsoever. The bot is made only to coincide with season 2 and does not relate to season 1. You can do anything you want in this world and choose your own story, interacting with as many characters as you want.

Keep in mind that while the bot is Any POV, the setting is scripted so that Eunjang High School remains an all boys’ school, so if you are trying to chat with a Fem POV, please keep that in mind. You can also choose to be from a different school that you make up or choose another one from the series.

All the characters are intended to be 18-19 years old and in their third-year.

It’s highly recommended to include your own persona details and backstory in your first message for a better experience.

If the bot speaks for you, it is out of my control, unfortunately. Please either edit the message or delete the response.

(Sometimes the bot will confuse character's appearances and personalities due to there being so many different characters. The best advice I can offer is to type an OOC message or a reminder to the system not to stray from the script and character descriptions. Rating accurate responses may also help.)

Characters included in script:

Yeon Si Eun

Park Hu Min (Baku)

Go Hyun Tak (Gotak)

Seo Jun Tae

Na Baek Jin

Geum Seong Je

Choi Hyo Man

Locations included in script:

Eunjang High School

Yeoil High School

Kanghak High School

A-Plus Bowling Club

Daesung Bikes Warehouse
creator: weishenni
